title: nageia wallichiana
intro: Nageia wallichiana, also known as the Indian parasol tree or Himalayan umbrella tree, is a species of coniferous evergreen tree native to the Eastern Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Nageia wallichiana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Nageia wallichiana can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
